bench_setup.notes: IWDG test. LSI oscillator enabled, IWDG configured with /256 prescaler and reload=4095 (~32.8s timeout). Firmware kicks watchdog every 1ms. PASS once IWDG starts without premature reset and firmware remains alive. detail0=heartbeat counter. No FAIL path — misconfigured IWDG causes reset and mailbox stays at RUNNING, reported as timeout by pipeline.
